---
title: "Material"
author: "Davi Moreira"
editor: visual
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table { font-size: 0.85rem; width: 100%; line-height: 1.25; }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.35rem; text-align: left; word-wrap: break-word; vertical-align: top;
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) { width: 34%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(2), .overflow-table td:nth-child(2) { width: 12%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(3), .overflow-table td:nth-child(3) { width: 18%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(4), .overflow-table td:nth-child(4) { width: 16%; }
  .below-table { font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.3; margin-top: 1rem; }
</style>
```

# Course Material

One notebook per topic, listed in course order. Open a notebook in Colab from
its badge (no installation needed), download every dataset the course uses in
one bundle, and find the week-by-week calendar on the [Schedule](schedule.qmd)
page. Milestone instructions and rubrics are on Brightspace.

::: overflow-table

| Topic | Sessions | Notebook | Data | Readings |
|-------|----------|----------|------|----------|
| **Week 1 — Research in the age of AI** | | | | |
| **Topic 00 · Research in the age of AI: your arm, your RA — not your brain** | 2 lectures | *nb00 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 1, 2 |
| **Week 2 — From curiosity to a research problem** | | | | |
| **Topic 01 · From curiosity to a research problem: descriptive, predictive, causal** | 2 lectures | *nb01 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 4, 7<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 3 — Research builds on research** | | | | |
| **Topic 02 · Research builds on research: verified evidence + real gaps** | 1 lecture | *nb02 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 4 |
| **Week 4 — The anatomy of a research design** | | | | |
| **Topic 03 · The anatomy of a research design: MIDA + declare → diagnose → redesign** | 2 lectures | *nb03 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 2, 5, 10<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 5 — Observational descriptive research** | | | | |
| **Topic 04 · Observational descriptive research** | 2 lectures | *nb04 (coming)* | `la_voter_file.csv`<br>`lapop_brazil.csv`<br>[all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 15<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 6 — Observational causal research** | | | | |
| **Topic 05 · Observational causal research** | 2 lectures | *nb05 (coming)* | `cliningsmith_etal.csv`<br>[all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 16<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 7 — Experimental descriptive research** | | | | |
| **Topic 06 · Experimental descriptive research** | 2 lectures | *nb06 (coming)* | `bonilla_tillery.csv`<br>[all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 17 |
| **Week 8 — Prediction** | | | | |
| **Topic 07 · Prediction: generalizing to unseen cases** | 1 lecture | *nb07 (coming)* | `la_voter_file.csv`<br>[all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | *+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 9 — Experimental causal research** | | | | |
| **Topic 08 · Experimental causal research** | 2 lectures | *nb08 (coming)* | `foos_etal.csv`<br>[all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 18 |
| **Week 10 — Share the research and attack the analysis** | | | | |
| **Topic 09 · Share the research + attack the analysis** | 2 lectures | *nb09 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | *+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 11 — Poster criticism and final poster lock** | | | | |
| **Topic 10 · Poster criticism + final poster lock** | 2 lectures | *nb10 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | — |
| **Week 12 — Poster delivery** | | | | |
| **Topic 11 · Poster delivery: pitches, uncertainty, difficult questions** | 2 lectures | *nb11 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | — |
| **Week 13 — Conference week** | | | | |
| **Topic 12 · Final conference preparation, presentation + reflection** | 1 lecture | *nb12 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | — |
| **Week 14 — Thanksgiving async: replication and red-team** | | | | |
| **Topic 13 · Async module: replication + red-team of a peer's package** | async module | *nb13 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | — |
| **Week 15 — From poster to research note** | | | | |
| **Topic 14 · From poster to research note** | 2 lectures | *nb14 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | — |
| **Week 16 — Managing multiple AI agents** | | | | |
| **Topic 15 · Managing multiple AI agents + the final defense** | 2 lectures | *nb15 (coming)* | [all datasets (.zip)](notebooks/data/honr46400_datasets.zip) | RDSS ch. 24 |

:::
::: below-table

The **Data** column links the **course datasets (.zip)** — every dataset used
across the notebooks, in one download. Notebooks also load the same files
automatically from the course repository, so the bundle is your offline copy.

## Core Course References

- **Blair, G., Coppock, A., & Humphreys, M.** (2023). *Research Design in the
  Social Sciences: Declaration, Diagnosis, and Redesign*. Princeton University
  Press. Read free online: [book.declaredesign.org](https://book.declaredesign.org/){target="_blank"}.
- **Bergstrom, C. T., & West, J. D.** (2020). *Calling Bullshit: The Art of
  Skepticism in a Data-Driven World* — optional companion; public case studies
  at [callingbullshit.org](https://callingbullshit.org/){target="_blank"}.
- Course datasets ship from the MIT-licensed `rdss` package (see
  [`notebooks/data/`](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464/tree/main/notebooks/data){target="_blank"}).

:::
